skills.name: gemini-skills
skills.description: Create new Gemini CLI skills, modify and improve existing skills, and measure skill performance. Use when users want to create a skill from scratch, edit, or optimize an existing skill for Gemini CLI, run evals to test a skill, benchmark skill performance with variance analysis, or optimize a skill's description for better triggering accuracy.

skills.name: orchestrator
skills.description: Routes and delegates user requests to specialized skill agents using LLM-based intent classification (RISEN framework). Manages session context, error handling, request queuing, routing history, and result relay. The single interface the user always interacts with. Use when coordinating tasks, orchestrating multi-step workflows, listing available skills, viewing routing history, or changing the confidence threshold.

skills.name: brand_kit
skills.description: Manages and applies brand identity guidelines, design tokens, and creative assets across workspaces.

skills.name: carousel
skills.description: Creates and formats interactive content carousels for markdown UI presentations.

skills.name: brand-kit-builder
skills.description: Interactive brand kit consultant that guides users through visual and verbal identity development. Analyzes provided visual references (images, URLs) to extract color palettes, typography, mood, and aesthetic, then builds brand elements one at a time through targeted questions. Produces a complete, styled HTML brand kit page.

skills.name: transcript-to-script
skills.description: Processes raw video transcripts to produce ready-to-film scripts (Safe & Bold versions), social media captions, and SEO packages following the SCRAPE framework. Use when the user presents video transcripts, asks to rewrite transcripts into scripts, wants social media captions/SEO tags for their video, or invokes '/transcript-to-script'.

skills.name: hindsight-memory
skills.description: Manages long-term agent memory using the Hindsight framework (Retain, Recall, Reflect). Extracts facts, user preferences, and observations from chat history to update memory/hindsight_memories.json, queries relevant context, and consolidates insights. Use when the user requests memory retrieval, fact extraction, reflection, updating preferences, or invokes '/hindsight'.

skills.name: autoresearch
skills.description: Runs autonomous machine learning research experiments by training models in a continuous loop. It modifies train.py, runs short training runs, evaluates the validation bits per byte (val_bpb), and uses Git to keep improvements or revert failures. Use when the user requests starting, resuming, or managing an autonomous experiment loop, or refers to Karpathy's 'autoresearch' setup.

skills.name: google-workspace-cli
skills.description: Manages Google Apps Script projects locally using the clasp CLI (Google Workspace CLI). Handles authentication, cloning/creating projects, pulling/pushing code, managing versions, and deploying standalone scripts or container-bound scripts (Sheets, Docs, Slides, etc.). Use when the user wants to work with Google Apps Script, local Google Workspace development, or runs clasp commands.
